title: Persistent Volumes — PersistentVolumeClaims
text:
Each PVC contains a spec and status, which is the specification and status of the claim.
The name of a PersistentVolumeClaim object must be a valid
DNS subdomain name
.
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata
:
name
:
myclaim
spec
:
accessModes
:
-
ReadWriteOnce
volumeMode
:
Filesystem
resources
:
requests
:
storage
:
8Gi
storageClassName
:
slow
selector
:
matchLabels
:
release
:
"stable"
matchExpressions
:
- {
key: environment, operator: In, values
:
[
dev]}
